description: A consumer bank account statement showing the account summary and an itemized list of transactions.

accountHolderName.description: Full name of the account holder as printed in the statement address block.

accountNumber.description: The checking account number shown in the statement header, kept as printed including any masking.

statementPeriodDays.description: Number of days in the statement period from the account activity summary.

previousBalance.description: The previous balance amount from the account activity summary box, as a number without currency symbols or separators.

totalCredits.description: Total deposits and credits amount from the account activity summary box.

totalDebits.description: Total checks and withdrawals amount from the account activity summary box.

endingBalance.description: The ending balance amount from the account activity summary box.

transactions.description: each row from the account activity / transaction register that carries a running balance, in order, across all pages. do not include rows from the separate Checks summary listing (check number and amount only, with no running balance).

date.description: Transaction date as printed in the row, in YYYY-MM-DD format.

description.description: The short printed payee or memo text identifying the transaction row.

debit.description: The debit amount for this row as a number, or null when the row has no debit.

credit.description: The credit amount for this row as a number, or null when the row has no credit.

balance.description: The running account balance printed at the end of this row as a number.
